content:
My team is mostly made of Thais e2, Uvhash +5, Winkle e0, and Faint e1.
I really want this team to work but I don't really know how to play them effectively?
Do I just spam Uvhash exalt? or do I charge it to overexalt? do I save OE for elite/boss? or what?
Where do I use Thais exalt on?
And most importantly, when people were talking about Uvhash, I keep seeing that Uvhash without his relic and Uvhash with his relic is a different dmg altogether. But what exactly is his relic?
thread_title: How to play Uvhash in exploration?
